title: Meadow's Overhauled Bow
description: Retextures the bow for a smooth, elegant look and makes feathers visible in all stages.
body:
# Vanilla Bow Refined
A lightweight resource pack that brings subtle improvements to the bow while **preserving the vanilla look**.

## Features
* **Subtle Refinement:** Smoother textures that fit perfectly into the original game style.
* **Consistency:** The crossbow remains unchanged to keep its distinct heavy look.
* **1.1 Update - Visible Feather:** You can now finally see the arrow's feather when pulling the bow!
